project.name: VM Framework
project.objective: Build a Libvirt-based virtual machine management framework with a patent-pending copy-on-write restore mechanism. Five-second full system restore. Point and click interface. Open source. Written in Rust.

milestones.name: Core agent organisation
milestones.description: All 15 agent roles defined, CLAUDE.md complete, PM agent operational, communication protocol established

milestones.name: Rust rewrite foundation
milestones.description: Core VM lifecycle management in Rust. Create, start, stop, destroy. Libvirt integration.

milestones.name: CoW restore mechanism
milestones.description: Patent-pending copy-on-write restore implemented in Rust. Five-second restore validated.

constraints: Requires Libvirt support on target system
CoW mechanism is patent pending — implementation must not deviate from patent claims without Marko approval

risks.description: Rust learning curve may slow initial implementation velocity
risks.mitigation: Agents act as senior Rust reviewers. Design language spec enforces idioms. Bash prototype remains reference implementation.

risks.description: Patent pending status creates constraints on what can be published in the open source repository
risks.mitigation: Marko reviews any commit touching the CoW mechanism before merge. Patent attorney consulted before publication.
